title: hymenophyllum ferrugineum
intro: Hymenophyllum ferrugineum, also known as rust-colored scale fern or rusty shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum ferrugineum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hymenophyllum ferrugineum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
